title: Technical Guide — Table of Contents Demo

blocks.text: This guide demonstrates the automatic table of contents (TOC) feature. The TOC block is placed near the top of the document and is auto-populated from all heading blocks that follow it.
Install pdfnative-cli globally with npm or run it with npx.
The render command converts a DocumentParams JSON object to a PDF file or stdout stream.
Use --stream for large documents to reduce peak memory usage.
Applies an RSA-SHA256 digital signature (CMS/PKCS#7) to a PDF.
Keys are loaded from env vars (PDFNATIVE_SIGN_KEY, PDFNATIVE_SIGN_CERT) or file paths (--key, --cert).
Analyses an existing PDF and outputs metadata in JSON or human-readable text format.
Use --format json (default) for machine-readable output, or --format text for a human-readable summary.
Signing keys are never logged. All file paths are validated against path traversal. JSON input is capped at 50 MB.

metadata.author: pdfnative-cli
metadata.subject: Table of contents demonstration
